cluster_notes.fitness_cluster: 5 apps from shared template. Each differentiated: yoga=styles+science, pushup=programs+rep tracking, plank=built-in timer+hold tracking, hiit=format library+calorie est, cycling=km/mi toggle+ride types
cluster_notes.plank_differentiator: PlankStreak has unique built-in timer tab — tap Start, plank, tap Pause, log directly from timer result. Highest conversion feature.
cluster_notes.cycling_differentiator: km/mi toggle is stored in state — persists across sessions. Stores km internally, converts on display.
